news.t: PGIM Announces Net Asset Value Restatement for Three Exchange-Traded Funds (PAB, PSDM, PTRB)

overview.description: The PGIM Total Return Bond ETF (PTRB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund seeks total return from an actively managed, core portfolio of global investment-grade and high-yield fixed income securities with a maturity of greater than one year. PTRB was launched on Dec 8, 2021 and is issued by PGIM.

data.title: PGIM Announces Net Asset Value Restatement for Three Exchange-Traded Funds (PAB, PSDM, PTRB)
data.text: NEWARK, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--This restatement is the result of an accounting error in calculating each exchange-traded fund's NAV by a third-party administrator.
